paper.title: Urban-Scale Facade Material Mapping from Street View Images Using Vision-Language Models for Circular Construction Planning
affiliations: 1 Department of Civil, Environmental and Geomatic Engineering (D-BAUG), ETH Zurich, Stefano-Franscini-Platz 5, 8093 Zurich, Switzerland
2 Department of Civil and Environmental Engineering, Stanford University, 473 Via Ortega, Stanford, California 94305, United States
paper.citation: Raghu, D., Armeni, I., and De Wolf, C. Urban-Scale Facade Material Mapping from Street View Images Using Vision-Language Models for Circular Construction Planning. Scientific Reports, 2026.
paper.figureCitation: Adapted from Raghu et al. (2026), Urban-Scale Facade Material Mapping from Street View Images Using Vision-Language Models for Circular Construction Planning, Scientific Reports
paper.abstract: URBAN-AI combines street-view imagery, Grounded-SAM, and GPT-4V to infer facade materials, building condition, architectural style, and city-specific screening indicators across six global cities.

cities.name: Cape Town
cities.downloadDescription: Facade-level results for Cape Town, including architectural style, building type, roof type, gutters, blank-wall potential, main facade material, and building condition for greening suitability screening.

cities.name: Melbourne
cities.downloadDescription: Facade-level results for Melbourne, including architectural style, roof type, energy-related facade indicators, main facade material, and building condition for retrofit screening.

cities.name: Mumbai
cities.downloadDescription: Facade-level results for Mumbai, including architectural style, number of storeys, building type, utilities visibility, main facade material, and building condition for morphology analysis.

cities.name: Rio de Janeiro
cities.downloadDescription: Facade-level results for Rio de Janeiro, including architectural style, number of storeys, building type, flood assessment proxy, main facade material, and building condition.

cities.name: San Francisco
cities.downloadDescription: Facade-level results for San Francisco, including architectural style, seismic vulnerability proxy, main facade material and building condition.

cities.name: Zurich
cities.downloadDescription: Facade-level results for Zurich, including architectural style, historical score indicators, facade material, and building condition for historical facade screening.
